title: Nah, usually I never care about trading tools etc, but using this as a indicator to confirm ur original trade setup have made me some serious profit..
author: Next-Syrup6935
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/bhhh41i834uf1.png?width=459&format=png&auto=webp&s=cf9507ff3a29789f4ab00f6316d6e8e768c3d9c1

UI have been strongly improved and much more details happening in the background.

So far [This](http://Tickrad.com) AI have increased my gains by 50%, i'm still using it as an indicator to confirm my original Bias, but it's outperforming me heavily already.

  
It's for sure the best AI tool when it comes to trading so far imo.  
Self trained MODEL with news / Social media is unique in itself, not ur typical gpt wrapped vibe coded crap.
